title: Contract Tests, Fault Injection, Deployment, Upgrade, and Recovery · Stakeholder TypeScript Mission
summary: An engineering, security, accessibility, data, and operations review board. The board needs TLS and least privilege, bounded tenant isolation, causal telemetry, capacity and alarm policy, layered tests, broker and dependency fault drills, compatible deployment, a supported 4.3 upgrade path, rollback, recovery objectives, and residual-risk ownership. Planned artifact: Deliver RabbitMQ 4.3 Production Messaging Defense with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint…
objectives: Use TLS with trusted CA, hostname and SNI verification, minimum protocol policy, client identity where required, and tested certificate rotation.
Defend tenant topology, message size, route, rate, queue count, headers, permissions, and noisy-neighbor budgets without trusting publisher metadata.
Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Project Amqps Identity Verification
steps.instruction:
project case — A project messaging team handles case 8495 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate release on contracts, broker faults, compatible rollout, rollback, and supported upgrade path; keep credentials and connection URLs out of learner output; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use TLS with trusted CA, hostname and SNI verification, minimum protocol policy, client identity where required, and tested certificate rotation.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Project Amqps Identity Verification.
